sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first: high satiety protein source because that is a major real-world strength for meat. complete protein delivery is reliable because the category is supposed to do this well. easy to centre a meal around because practical meal value matters.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: the drawbacks next: fat quality can go sideways fast because some meats are strong until the fat profile shows up. cost and storage can be a pain because practical downsides still count. quality swings a lot by cut and processing because the category can look very different depending on what version you actually buy.
